items.name: utils
items.title: Utils
items.description: Utility functions including cn for class merging.

items.name: globals
items.title: Global Styles
items.description: CSS variables for light/dark themes, ruler colors, and animation keyframes.

items.name: liquid-metal
items.title: Liquid Metal
items.description: Animated liquid metal shader component and badge with chrome border effect.

items.name: hero
items.title: Hero
items.description: Hero section with large typography, gradient text, and liquid metal badge.

items.name: glitch-text
items.title: Glitch Text
items.description: Cyberpunk text effect with constant chromatic aberration, horizontal slice distortion, and CRT scanlines.

items.name: glow-button
items.title: Glow Button
items.description: Button with animated glow hover effect and press animation.

items.name: animated-button
items.title: Animated Button
items.description: Button with press animation and hover effects.

items.name: animated-rays
items.title: Animated Rays
items.description: Rotating ray background effect for hero sections.

items.name: side-frame
items.title: Side Frame
items.description: SVG ruler guides with scroll and cursor tracking, theme-aware via MutationObserver.

items.name: navbar
items.title: Navbar
items.description: Fixed navbar with triangle wipe theme toggle, search bar with cursor spotlight, and border trace effects.

items.name: footer
items.title: Footer
items.description: Bottom footer with logo, branding text, and license info. Theme-aware.

items.name: docs-sidebar
items.title: Docs Sidebar
items.description: Documentation sidebar with navigation and active state tracking.

items.name: stacked-logos
items.title: Stacked Logos
items.description: Stacked logo carousel with hover effects.

items.name: shrine-cards
items.title: Shrine Cards
items.description: Layout component with shrine-style card arrangement.

items.name: faq-section
items.title: FAQ Section
items.description: Collapsible FAQ accordion with smooth animations and keyboard navigation.

items.name: code-block
items.title: Code Block
items.description: Syntax-highlighted code block with copy button and tab support.

items.name: error-boundary
items.title: Error Boundary
items.description: React error boundary with retry functionality and custom fallback UI.

items.name: tech-logos
items.title: Tech Logos
items.description: Animated tech stack marquee with auto-scrolling logos.

items.name: lazy-section
items.title: Lazy Section
items.description: Lazy-load section with IntersectionObserver for performance optimization.

items.name: testimonials-section
items.title: Testimonials Section
items.description: Social proof section with animated scrolling testimonial cards.

items.name: impression-section
items.title: Impression Section
items.description: Feature showcase with interactive tabs and smooth transitions.
